ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number assigned by the airline */,
  "aircraft_id" TEXT /* ID of the aircraft used for the flight */,
  "departure_airport" TEXT /* Code of the departure airport */,
  "arrival_airport" TEXT /* Code of the arrival airport */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time of the flight */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time of the flight */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pilot assigned to the flight */,
  "copilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the co-pilot assigned to the flight */,
  "flight_status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., on time, delayed, in progress, completed) */,
  "actual_duration" REAL /* Actual duration of the flight */,
  "flight_distance" REAL /* Distance covered by the flight */,
  "flight_type" TEXT /* Type of flight (e.g., commercial, cargo, private) */,
  "flight_route" TEXT /* Route details (e.g., flight path, waypoints) */,
  "flight_capacity" TEXT /* Passenger and cargo capacity of the flight */,
  "flight_load" TEXT /* Actual passenger and cargo load of the flight */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at departure and arrival */,
  "air_traffic_control_data" TEXT /* Relevant air traffic control information */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Maintenance notes or issues */,
  "regulatory_compliance" TEXT /* Compliance information with regulatory bodies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_departure_airport FOREIGN KEY ("departure_airport") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_arrival_airport FOREIGN KEY ("arrival_airport") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_pilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("pilot_id") REFERENCES pilots ("pilot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_copilot_id FOREIGN KEY ("copilot_id") REFERENCES pilots ("pilot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight to which the data point belongs */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the aircraft */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the aircraft */,
  "altitude_agl_ft" REAL /* Altitude above ground level (AGL) in feet */,
  "speed_kts" REAL /* Speed of the aircraft in knots */,
  "heading_deg" REAL /* Heading of the aircraft in degrees */,
  "rate_of_descent_fpm" REAL /* Rate of descent in feet per minute */,
  "altitude_msl_ft" REAL /* Altitude above mean sea level (MSL) in feet */,
  "fuel_consumption_gal" REAL /* Fuel consumption at the time of data point */,
  "engine_rpm" REAL /* Engine RPM at the time of data point */,
  "engine_egt_deg" REAL /* Engine EGT at the time of data point */,
  "cabin_pressure_psi" REAL /* Cabin pressure at the time of data point */,
  "temperature_in_deg" REAL /* Temperature inside the aircraft at the time of data point */,
  "humidity_pct" REAL /* Humidity inside the aircraft at the time of data point */,
  "weather_data" TEXT /* Weather data at the location of the aircraft */,
  "air_traffic_control_data" TEXT /* Relevant air traffic control data at the time of data collection */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who collected the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user login */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., pilot, air traffic controller, maintenance personnel) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "capacity" TEXT /* Capacity of the aircraft (passenger and cargo) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next maintenance */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Unique code of the airport */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "elevation_ft" REAL /* Elevation of the airport in feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "pilots" (
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pilot */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the pilot */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the pilot */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the pilot */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the pilot */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of flying experience */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the pilot */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the pilot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pilot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "aircraft_id" TEXT /* ID of the aircraft */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "completed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who completed the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the weather data */,
  "temperature_deg" REAL /* Temperature at the location */,
  "humidity_pct" REAL /* Humidity at the location */,
  "wind_speed_mph" REAL /* Wind speed at the location */,
  "wind_direction_deg" REAL /* Wind direction at the location */,
  "cloud_cover_pct" REAL /* Cloud cover at the location */,
  "precipitation_mm" REAL /* Precipitation at the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_traffic_control_data" (
  "atc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air traffic control data point */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the air traffic control data */,
  "clearance" TEXT /* Clearance status (e.g., cleared, delayed) */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Instructions given to the flight */,
  "atc_station" TEXT /* Air traffic control station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("atc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_traffic_control_data_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory body */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of compliance */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes related to compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight report */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., post-flight, maintenance) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Detailed data of the report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who generated the report */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the report */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date of approval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_reports_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
